	 vim:linebreak:nowrap:nospell:cul tw=78 fo=tqlnr foldcolumn=3 
--- 
title: 028_A_ggplot_aes_examples.Rmd 
output: 
  pdf_document: 
    latex_engine: xelatex
toc: TRUE 
toc_depth:  1 
fontsize: 11pt 
geometry: margin=0.3,top=0.25in 
---

<!-- 
/home/jim/.config/nvim/templates/skeleton.Rmd
set cul   "cursorline
cc=+1			"colorcolumn is 1 more than tw
-->

##  Purpose
-  aes() starrting from very simple ... on

##  Sources

-  [r4ds](http://r4ds.had.co.nz/)
-  [ggplot2](https://ggplot2-book.org)
-  [Gregor](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/40391272/ggplot-object-not-found-error-when-adding-layer-with-different-data/40391432#40391432)


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
kexamples.Rmdnitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(jimTools)
```

```{r curve}
# part of graphics (ie plot) but neds X11
curve(qnorm)
curve(sin, -1, 1)
```
